summary.notes: Local validation server rerun on http://127.0.0.1:3102 satisfied all requested foundation-fixes API assertions.

assertions.summary: GET /global/market_cap_chart?vs_currency=usd&days=7 returned market_cap_chart with 7 tuples; first tuple was [1773446400000, 2144500000000].
GET /coins/bitcoin/market_chart?vs_currency=usd&days=7&interval=daily returned prices with 7 tuples aligned to daily buckets from 1773446400000 through 1773964800000.

GET /coins/ethereum/contract/0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48/market_chart?vs_currency=usd&days=7&interval=daily returned 7 USDC contract price tuples aligned to the same seeded daily timestamps.
GET /simple/token_price/eth and /simple/token_price/ethereum both returned HTTP 200 with identical empty-object JSON bodies.
GET /coins/eth/contract/0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48 returned HTTP 200 and body id usd-coin.
GET /token_lists/eth/all.json and /token_lists/ethereum/all.json matched and both carried the name OpenGecko Ethereum Token List.
GET /coins/bitcoin/ohlc?vs_currency=usd&days=7 returned 7 OHLC tuples aligned to midnight UTC timestamps.

observations: VAL-FND-002 prices length 7; timestamps 1773446400000..1773964800000 aligned to daily buckets
VAL-FND-003 USDC contract chart prices length 7 aligned to the same seeded dates
VAL-FND-004 eth and ethereum simple/token_price responses were identical empty objects with HTTP 200
VAL-FND-005 /coins/eth/contract/... returned HTTP 200 with id usd-coin
VAL-FND-006 eth and ethereum token lists matched and had name OpenGecko Ethereum Token List
VAL-FND-012 /coins/bitcoin/ohlc returned 7 OHLC tuples aligned to midnight UTC timestamps
